programme.title: Food Paradise: Totally Unexpected
programme.desc: From a password-protected cheeseburger in Chicago to top-notch barbecue in at a Walla Walla gas station, we try the most delicious dishes at the most surprising places across the country.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Ooey Gooey Greatness
programme.desc: From majorly melty mac and cheese to fudgy, chewy triple chocolate cookies, diners are living the gooey good life at these restaurants across the nation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Guy experiences the unusual off the grill, such as a Thai twist on classic Texas bbq.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All San Diego, All the Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's heading to San Diego for some favorites, old and new. In Ocean Beach, Calif., Guy's hittin' up a legendary surfer spot for some righteous burgers with an old buddy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Buns and Bagels
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns and bagels. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, an amped up deli serves lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Legacies
programme.desc: Guy Fieri looks into some classic restaurant favourites in America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross-Country Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's roadtrippin' all over the country for some home-style cooking. In Boston, the funky neighbourhood joint cranking out Southern staples, like chicken and waffles and off-the-hook tots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Arizona All-Stars
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' Southwest for a flavor-filled tour of Scottsdale, Arizona. First, the real deal Italian market making an authentic beef specialty straight from the mother country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Something Sweet
programme.desc: It's Diners, Drive-Ins, Dives and decadence with plenty of sweet to go along with the savory. First up, Guy Fieri's in Kansas City, Mo., where a brunch spot is serving up a vegan treat rich enough for any meat eater.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Like Mama Made
programme.desc: Guy travels to St. Louis where a former backup singer is serving old school soul food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Timeless Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy gets the lowdown on some longstanding traditions. In Philadelphia, the Jamaican joint going all out authentic with the jerk chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy visits Alamaba for homemade gumbo and a super spicy crawfish boil.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Roots
programme.desc: Guy digs into dishes with a personal connection, including a Jewish deli in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Their Own Way
programme.desc: Guy meets cooks doing things their own way in Flagstaff Arizona.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Gardening with Julie
programme.desc: Now that she's no longer on her world tour, Trisha Yearwood finally has time to grow fresh veggies in her garden and she's enlisting one of her close friends for help. Together they whip up a delicious lunch that includes creamy corn and Chile dip.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Rainbow Connection
programme.desc: Bakery owner Amirah Kassem takes her first trip to Nashville to join Trisha Yearwood for a meal inspired by her recent performance at New York City's Rainbow Room.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Twin City Treats
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli brings a taste of home to her friend, Minnesota native Melissa Peterman, tempting her with the best Midwest bounty.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Welcome Home, Newlyweds!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is preparing a welcome home meal to deliver to her best friend Suzanne's son and his wife, who are returning from their honeymoon.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Ladd's Birthday
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her family are celebrating Ladd's birthday with his favorite foods for dinner. There's a juicy, rare Filet with Roasted Garlic Butter that Ree pairs with Cheesy Au Gratin Potatoes and a fun cowboy-style Chopped Salad Board.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Ree Drummond packs a kitchen-equipment care package for her daughter, Alex, working in Dallas. There's a delicious quarter sheet pan supper that's quick to make after a day in the office.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: In the Pot
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making warming wonders, and each one is cooked in just one pot to save time and cleanup. She starts with Asian Braised Beef that's slow-cooked, shredded and served over rice.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Feeding Now, Feeding Later
programme.desc: Ree makes spicy stewed beef, pimento cheese and bacon grits, roasted broccoli salad and a sour cream and parsley dressing.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Book Club Party
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is hosting book club on the farm. She makes walnut-crusted brie mac and cheese, succulent skillet pork chops with salsa verde, squash and apple salad with mustardy dressing and, for dessert, Dakota-style plum cakes.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: 20th Anniversary at the Opry
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood celebrates her 20th year as the 20th female member of the Grand Ole Opry by cooking up riffs on her greatest culinary hits from the past two decades. Her menu includes pepper jack cheese straws and smokey maple bacon sweet potato.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Sister Supper
programme.desc: Kardea Brown gets her sisters together for a special Southern dinner. The scrumptious menu includes fried pork chops with homemade table gravy and rainbow rice pilaf. For dessert, Kardea bakes up a treat that all the sisters love, red velvet sheet cake.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Family Reunion
programme.desc: Kardea Brown's family reunions are big, loud and legendary events. She's hosting the party at her Charleston, S.C., home and makes all the family favorites, including No-Fuss Baby Back Ribs with Carolina Moppin' Sauce and a beautiful 4-Bean Salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Lovin' in the Oven
programme.desc: The Kitchen is warming up for the winter with dishes from the oven that are braised, broiled, roasted, toasted and baked. Geoffrey Zakarian makes his beer braised pork pot roast with winter vegetables, and Jeff Mauro shares his roasted gnocchi and veggie.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Carnivores Unite
programme.desc: One chef takes a big risk by creating a meat-lovers platter without any meat. Then, it's an Asian-inspired challenge when the chefs make bento boxes, and the final two chefs make their best nutty dishes in a sweet versus savory battle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Winner Winter Games
programme.desc: It's cold outside, but the competition is heating up in Flavortown Market as Guy Fieri welcomes back three previous GGG winners to compete in his winter-themed games.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Pitz Carlton

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pressure Cooker
programme.desc: Villalobos faces one of their most challenging rescues when a house fire reveals a massive dog-hoarding situation. Two teachers fall in love with a deaf puppy they hope to give a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Box of Puppies
programme.desc: A potential adopter wants to give a forever home to a senior dog that has only known life in a kennel. M2 and Kanani are shocked when they find a box of puppies in a field. And, Matt and Earl head to the kitchen to cook up some fresh food for a sick dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Storm on the Horizon
programme.desc: With hurricane season approaching, Tia prepares for the worst. Then, Tia uncovers a clue that may help Mariah and the twins track down a Katrina dog's owner. And Villalobos employee Rico steps up to the plate when his grandparents adopt a shy dog.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl XVII Presents: Pupularity Playoffs: Week 1
Pit Bulls & Parolees: Invisible Enemy
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes after Tia and M2 agree to take two emaciated hounds from a rural shelter. Mariah and Lizzy give two special dogs a happily ever after while working through the chaos of the global pandemic, and M2 reveals an exciting new life chapter.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Here in Their Golden Years
programme.desc: Wanting to give the senior dogs a special place, Lizzy, Tania, and Mariah create a 'retirement center' at one of the warehouses.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Invisible Enemy
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes after Tia and M2 agree to take two emaciated hounds from a rural shelter. Mariah and Lizzy give two special dogs a happily ever after while working through the chaos of the global pandemic, and M2 reveals an exciting new life chapter.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Battle Scars
programme.desc: A frightening rescue sends the Villalobos team racing into the city in search of a dog reportedly hit by a car.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Flood Watch
programme.desc: Tia receives a call about a puppy stuck in a pipe at the edge of the river and enlists the help of the twins and the parolees to rescue the dog. Then, it's up to Tania and Perry to help build up a shy puppy's confidence when an adopter comes calling.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Can't Give Up
programme.desc: When a dog finally gets a chance at being adopted, the Villalobos team has to drive all the way to Michigan for the home check. Their journey is disrupted when a plea for help sends Tia chasing after a dog that has been living on the streets for 2 years.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Collision Course
programme.desc: A dangerous rescue mission is launched to secure two dogs spotted running wild on the train tracks next to the rescue center.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under Suspicion

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's Substitute

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Lover

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge Gets a Job

programme.title: The Simpsons: New Kid on the Block
programme.desc: Feelings aren't mutual when Bart falls hard for Evergreen Terrace's newest neighbour, Laura, who only thinks of Bart as her little friend.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mommie Beerest
programme.desc: When Moe's is shut down for health violations, Homer refinances his house to save the bar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson, This Is Your Wife
programme.desc: Homer's obsession with Lenny's new plasma TV prompts Marge to enter the family in a sweepstakes, and they win a trip to the Fox Studio Lot. Against Marge's wishes, Homer signs them up for a Trading Spouses-type show.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: When Bart and Milhouse pull off a prank at Springfield Elementary, Milhouse takes the fall and gets suspended from school. As punishment, Homer forces Bart to visit Grampa at his retirement home where he becomes smitten with a volunteer named Jenny.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fabulous Faker Boy
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side, and his initial resistance quickly subsides when Marge hires Slava’s beautiful daughter, Zhenya, as his new piano instructor.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Doomsday Super Sub
programme.desc: US spy satellites monitoring North Korea's naval shipyards capture images that reveal alarming developments to their fleet. Experts use cutting-edge scientific analysis to identify a new class of submarine designed for a catastrophic global threat.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibals in the Ghost City
programme.desc: An abandoned city in the African jungle might have a bloody past of malevolent spirits and cannibals. Mount Vesuvius shows signs that it's awakening, and the mafia could be to blame. Experts investigate Hitler's secret Nazi UFO program.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Enigmas of Area 51
programme.desc: Satellites capture two strange patterns in the desert, and they are right next to Area 51.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Empire of the Amazon
programme.desc: New evidence could lead to the discovery of an unknown ancient civilization in the Amazon rainforest. An island disappears, and investigators are mystified. An unidentified submarine is spotted in a North Korean shipyard.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibals in the Ghost City
programme.desc: An abandoned city in the African jungle might have a bloody past of malevolent spirits and cannibals. Mount Vesuvius shows signs that it's awakening, and the mafia could be to blame. Experts investigate Hitler's secret Nazi UFO program.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Phantom Island
programme.desc: When an island off the coast of Mexico suddenly disappears, government officials scramble to find an explanation; cutting-edge technology might reveal if the strange place was destroyed by a foreign power or if it existed at all.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Firefighting Water Bombs
programme.desc: Maintenance crews at a remote airstrip are exposed to the elements as they keep water-bombing aircraft flying to battle forest fires, and mechanics race against the clock to get transport helicopters to safely shuttle oil rig workers.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Roller Coaster 911
programme.desc: When the world's oldest roller coaster breaks at the worst possible moment, skilled engineers and technicians race against the clock to investigate what went wrong and how to fix it before it's opened to the public.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Ice Bridge Nightmare
programme.desc: A determined team of expert technicians battle nature's destructive force to keep one of the world's longest road bridges open in deadly conditions.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Mission Las Vegas
programme.desc: Brave lighting technicians battle extreme desert conditions to keep the lights bright in Las Vegas; they put their lives at stake to perform risky neon bulb replacements at terrifying heights and surrounded by hundreds of volts of electricity.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: High-Wire Hell
programme.desc: Working thousands of feet above the California desert, brave engineers and fearless crews perform perilous high-wire acts to keep the hi-tech tramway system operating safely for the hundreds of daily tourists it transports.

programme.title: MythBusters: Blow It Out the Water
programme.desc: Adam and Jamie blow up a boat with 1,000 pounds of high explosives before building a homemade machine gun from Breaking Bad's season finale.

programme.title: MythBusters: Supersonic Ping Pong/ Ice Cannon
programme.desc: In this ballistics bonanza, Adam and Jamie ask if supersonic ping pong can go lethally wrong, while Kari, Grant and Tory light the frozen fuse on a cannon made of ice!

programme.title: MythBusters: Hollywood Car Crash Clichés
programme.desc: It's wall-to-wall automotive mayhem as the MythBusters drive through glass, plough through traffic and fire an RPG at an SUV to take aim at classic Hollywood crash clichés.

programme.title: MythBusters: Accidental Ammo
programme.desc: Stand by for some ballistic backyard bedlam and a gruesome glass guillotine in an episode devoted to accidental ammo.

programme.title: How It's Made: Suits of Armor, Street Light Poles, Membrane Switch
programme.desc: Learn how suits of armor, street light poles, bent hardwood and membrane switches are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Plant Oil Extractors, Custom Chandeliers, Power Trainers, and Coffee Pods
programme.desc: Find out how plant oil extractors, power trainers, and coffee pods are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Dragster Tires, Icing, Floating Docks, Spiral Pipes
programme.desc: Dragster tires; icing; floating docks; spiral pipes.

programme.title: How It's Made: Indy Car Seats; Paper Flowers; Stand-by Generators
programme.desc: On this episode of How it's Made: INDY Seating Pods; Paper Flowers; Alternators.

programme.title: How It's Made: Technological Corks, Zinc Gutters, Traditional Basque Ham, and Chisteras
programme.desc: Find out how technological corks, zinc gutters, traditional basque ham and chisteras are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Turf Grass; Beef Jerky; Wood Chippers; Bowling Pins
programme.desc: Learn how they make turf grass, beef jerky, wood chippers and bowling pins.

programme.title: Betrayed: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: After Marilyn Reza, a church-going mother of two is found dead in her home, investigators turn their attention to the members of her local church. However, a secret confession at her funeral brings the true murderer to light.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Careful Who U Wish 4
programme.desc: A girl recovering from an abusive relationship looks for love on a popular dating site.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crime Scene Selfie
programme.desc: 23-year-old Amanda Taylor shares her entire life on the internet. Following a terrible tragedy, her posts begin take a dark turn.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Death of an Internet Star
programme.desc: When a young fashion designer and mother of three becomes a YouTube star with her online sewing tutorials, the money starts rolling in. But her obsessive and violent ex-boyfriend isn't prepared to let her rise to the top without him in her life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love at First Text
programme.desc: When a single mom finds her dream man online, she can't believe her luck. But her quest to meet him soon turns into every mother's worst nightmare. As police scramble to avert tragedy, they discover the most elaborate web of lies they've ever seen.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Devil's Pact
programme.desc: When a young mother of three plummets into depression, she turns to the internet to find comfort. What she discovers is a virtual world of fetishes and fantasies, where seemingly helpful hands hide the darkest of intentions.

programme.title: Web of Lies: In Dark Corners
programme.desc: Vulnerable mother of five Laura Simonson seeks comfort in the online world of sexual bondage. Lured by a mysterious user named 'Mr. Handcuffs,' Laura doesn't know that she's walking straight into his twisted trap.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hitman 4 Hire
programme.desc: Leslie and Brian Long live in an affluent suburban of St. Clairsville, Ohio with their two beautiful kids. When Leslie goes online to make business contacts, the family is besieged with mysterious threats, and Bryan is almost killed by an unknown gunman.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Flirting with the Enemy
programme.desc: College freshman Jason Rodriguez finds excitement in his newfound freedom online when he begins dating several girls who pique his interest. But soon after meeting one of them offline, he turns up dead and the identity of his online friends are revealed.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Honeytrap
programme.desc: An aspiring young boxer leaves in night to meet girl who added him on Facebook. The next day he if sound dead in his car and the murder reveals a dark family secret kept hidden for over 30 years.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love Goes South
programme.desc: Lonely musician Ray Merrill thinks he's found his dream woman in Brazil through an online dating website. But as the exotic romance heats up, money starts to go missing.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Small Town Secret
programme.desc: When young Kari Nixon goes missing while on a snack run, no one in her upstate New York town can imagine why anyone would harm her. With no body and few clues, detectives struggle to solve the mystery until a twist leads police to an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Fallen Starr
programme.desc: When beloved wife and mother Starr Harris is savagely murdered in the woods behind her home, the trees hide more than just the killer's identity. The cold-blooded killing rocks tiny Drummonds, TN, but soon determined cops uncover a smoking gun.

programme.title: Cold Valley: Person of Interest
programme.desc: Between 1979 and 1982, five young people went missing or were found murdered in the Lewis Clark Valley area. Detective Jackie Nichols picks up the trail and begins her hunt for an elusive serial killer who has evaded justice for over forty years.

programme.title: Cold Valley: Person of Interest
programme.desc: Detective Jackie Nichols continues her hunt for an elusive serial killer responsible for the murder and disappearances of five young people in the Lewis Clark Valley.

programme.title: Cold Valley: Hunting a Killer
programme.desc: Detective Jackie Nichols re-examines decades old evidence and deconstructs her suspect's alibi in an effort to once and for all separate fact from fiction.

programme.title: Cold Valley: Hunting A Killer
programme.desc: Detective Jackie Nichols and amateur sleuth Gloria Bobertz ramp up their investigations into the Lewis Clark Valley serial murders and take a deeper dive into their Person of Interests disturbing past.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Winter Blaze
programme.desc: After a house fire lights up a Wisconsin night, firefighters find the bodies of a woman and two kids, with evidence they'd been bound before the blaze. Police learn the victim's infant son is missing and must scramble to find the deadly kidnappers.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Bitter Blade
programme.desc: When a beautiful home healthcare worker disappears during an icy New York night, loved ones lead the search for her safe return. But a series of incoming text messages and a mysterious missed call reveal a soul-crushing truth and a murder most evil.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: The Axe Man Cometh
programme.desc: A kind-hearted woman is found slain in her bed; seems to be a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: A pastor discovers a bartender's strangled corpse in the snow, just days before Christmas. Suspicion turns toward the bartender's best friend, but detectives aren't quite sure.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Frozen Waters
programme.desc: When a mother and her two young children mysteriously go missing, her family goes to their home only to discover it empty. Then, two local boys nearby also disappear.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Cold Blue
programme.desc: Kay Weden finds her mother inexplicably murdered inside her own home. Then, investigators discover the frozen remains of her boyfriend in the icy peaks of Blue Ridge Mountains. Only by speaking with Kay do investigators realize she's being stalked.

programme.title: The Mob Enforcer: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: See the story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Russian Arms Dealer
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Cocaine King: El Negro
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: The Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. But by the early 2000's evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mob Citizen: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: The story of mobster Joe Colombo, whose love of fame and money was matched by his determination to campaign against Italian-American harassment in the United States.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mob Citizen: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: The story of mobster Joe Colombo, whose love of fame and money was matched by his determination to campaign against Italian-American harassment in the United States.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: The Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. But by the early 2000's evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Cocaine King: El Negro
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Preserving a Passion That's 'In-Tents'
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Destined for Demo
programme.desc: Ashley is feeling extremely overwhelmed.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Yellow Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with an old Victorian that still has most of its original details.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Gulf Shores Gut Job
programme.desc: A couple gears up to make the coastal paradise of Gulf Shores, AL, their forever home. The couple hunts for a bargain and lands the perfect place in need of big-time renovations.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bowl O' Bayou
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown sheds light on Cajun and Creole, and comes up with a method for making a brick roux and the perfect gumbo.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pretzel Logic
programme.desc: Alton Brown recreates the traditional soft pretzel in all its crisp, chewy, golden brown glory.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Choux Shine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally turns this old show about pate a choux into what it always should have been: an episode about chocolate eclairs. That means a new pastry cream and a chocolate glaze.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Chuck for Chuck: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' the pot roast from 2001. He's learned a lot since then, and it shows, because this is what pot roast is supposed to be.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione vs. McClain
programme.desc: Iron Chef Marc Forgione faces off against challenger Shawn McClain, the executive chef at Sage, at Aria Resort and Casino in Las Vegas. Martin Yan, Ching-He Huang and Adam Richman are the judges for this battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Medina
programme.desc: Mexico City native Chef Julian Medina enters Kitchen Stadium to challenge the master of Latin food, Iron Chef Jose Garces.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Cantu
programme.desc: Chef Masaharu Morimoto hopes to reign supreme following his battle with Chef Homaru Cantu.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon Vs. Brock
programme.desc: Sean Brock enters Kitchen stadium for the first time to challenge Iron Chef Michael Symon.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian vs. Taymor
programme.desc: Coastal Californian chef Ari Taymor rides a wave of success into Kitchen Stadium and immediately gets to the root of the matter against Iron Chef Geoffrey Zakarian.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Pham
programme.desc: Iron Chef Bobby Flay faces off against Challenger Viet Pham. Chef Pham is co-owner of Forage, an award-winning restaurant in Salt Lake City. Judges are Simon Majumdar, Donatella Arpaia and Ben Sargent.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: SoCal Sweets
programme.desc: We're coasting through Southern California to cool down with the hottest frozen treats. At Snow Monster in Long Beach, they offer sophisticated ice cream creations, like macaron ice cream sandwiches and drinks topped with clouds of cotton candy.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Twists on American Classics
programme.desc: The Doughnut Project in New York City offers savory-meets-sweet doughnuts, including a doughnut crossed with an everything bagel, and a chocolate cream doughnut flavored with bone marrow.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Miami Sweets
programme.desc: We're in the sweet spot of the Sunshine State, Miami! The folks at The Salty Donut pride themselves on their buttery 24-hour brioche doughnut dough and have fun with topping combinations like key lime pie and peach bourbon.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sugar High
programme.desc: It's time for the ultimate sugar high. In Miami, Brain Freeze Nitrogen Ice Cream Lab is concocting delicious creations, and offering a mad scientist challenge to eat 30 scoops of ice cream in 30 minutes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Shocking Sweets
programme.desc: New York's most shocking sweets! In Astoria, Queens, an underground donut spot called Donut Diva is frying up outrageous cake donut creations and baking coffee cake unlike anything you have ever seen.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Tasty Texas Treats
programme.desc: In the Lone Star State to find the tastiest treats in Texas! Hypnotic Donuts in Dallas is serving up deep-fried deliciousness in the form of huge fritters with decked-out flavors.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: By the Sea
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore. Whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Between the Bun
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson reveals entirely excessive and utterly outrageous takes on the humble hamburger. Beef patties and two buns are required, but every other ingredient is maxed out to create the most exorbitant burgers ever imagined.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Travel to Los Angeles, where the weather is warm and the local food is fantastic.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Memphis
programme.desc: From sweet deals on steak dinners at The Butchershop, to the guilty pleasure of indulgent surf and turf at Iris, Memphis is home to some of the best food you'll ever eat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Miami
programme.desc: We are headed to Miami for a little fun in the sun and some truly epic eats. We're trying it all, from stone crabs at Joe's, to the lamb shank at Sardinia. The piping hot oven at Fratelli La Bufala is turning out pillowy calzones.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mid-Atlantic
programme.desc: A Mid-Atlantic sampling of seafood, from crab cakes in Baltimore, to paella in Washington, DC.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Orleans
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the Big Easy where the food and the culture are a mix of southern tradition and modern influence.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Martha's Vineyard
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Martha's Vineyard, the island community off the coast of Cape Cod, Massachusetts, where the fresh local catch is delivered to restaurants each day.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Frankfurt
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Frankfurt where he samples everything from the classic frankfurter and apple wine to pork shoulder with sauerkraut and hand cheese with music.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tuscany
programme.desc: Andrew explores the cuisine of Tuscany, Italy, which is rooted in the tradition of 'cucina povera' or food made with local, high quality ingredients.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Win a Twin/ Skeeter and the Super Girls

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.desc: The Dudes visit the Dallas Stars and partake in some of the players' favourite games. Then, they go on a mission to take spy games to a new level.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show: Super Heroes and Fun Raiser
programme.desc: The Dudes decide to harness their inner Superheroes. Then, they put together a "Fun-Raiser" to buy new sporting equipment for a local football team.

programme.title: Movie: Rio
programme.desc: When a domesticated parrot in Minnesota meets the bird of his dreams, they take off to Rio de Janeiro.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: When Pants Attack
programme.desc: Jimmy inserts a smart chip into his pants so that they will fold and put themselves away.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Normal Boy/ Birth of a Salesman
programme.desc: Jimmy invents a machine to make himself less smart; Jimmy uses his genius to sell candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Animal House Party/ Lice-enced to Teach
programme.desc: A wild party is planned when the brothers are set to be alone for the weekend; the friends orchestrate a break-in to rescue a chimpanzee.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Artsy Smartsy/ The Crush
programme.desc: Theodore helps Simon to try and get past his perfectionism in order to complete an art assignment for art class. Simon has a crush on the babysitter and secretly prepares a romantic dinner while Theodore keeps Alvin distracted.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Slink or Swim/ The Big Chill
programme.desc: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves. After begging Abuelo for A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.title: The Loud House: Home of the Fave/ Hero Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: After a pun-filled trip to the grocery store with Luan and Lola, Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favourites. When Lynn's friend Margo is celebrated for a one-in-a-million soccer goal, Lynn has to try and be supportive.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cooked!
programme.desc: The kids promise to help Dad with the grand opening of his new restaurant by coming up with promotions. But their lack of teamwork and crazy promos lead to an ultimate nightmare in the kitchen for Dad.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Write Stuff/ Racing Hearts
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-books way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over. When Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods, they discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House: Everybody Loves Leni/ Middle Men
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together. When Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Getaway/ Lost and Found
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson. When Mr. Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost in the lost and found.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward redecorate his house. / Plankton forms a rock band with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.desc: As the Turtles try to foil a Kraang invasion plot, they are hunted by a giant, indestructible cockroach.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Enemy of My Enemy
programme.desc: After witnessing the Kraang in action, Karai comes to realize the seriousness of an alien threat and approaches the Turtles to propose an alliance.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Karai's Vendetta
programme.desc: While the Turtles are infiltrating an undersea Kraang base, the Foot Clan attempts to capture April, forcing her to fend for herself in a battle of wits against Karai.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Parasitica
programme.desc: Michelangelo must save his brothers after they fall under the control of a parasitic wasp.

programme.desc: When Chapa's distraction with a crush causes the Danger Force to fail a mission, the gang bust find her obsession to get her back to her normal self.

programme.title: The Substitute: The Miz
programme.desc: Celebrities are transformed to go undercover as substitute teachers to surprise a class.

programme.title: Movie: Rio
programme.desc: When a domesticated parrot in Minnesota meets the bird of his dreams, they take off to Rio de Janeiro.

programme.desc: When Miss Shapen's niece, Noelle, comes into town and chooses Jasper over Henry, Henry discovers that Noelle has much bigger plans than just going out to dinner with Jasper.

programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: The Siege of Lothal

programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: McVeigh's Shocking Confession (Part 2)
programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: Reconstructing the Crime Scene (Part 1)
programme.desc: On April 15th 2013, two bombs explode during the iconic Boston Marathon, killing three spectators and injuring hundreds others. In a race against time, investigators, using state of the art technology, circulate images to the public.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Kidnapping of Elizabeth Smart (Part 1)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart was kidnapped from her home, snatched from her bed at knifepoint by a man in the middle of the night. We look at the unbelievable nine month saga of the police investigation and family fight to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Three Million Dollar Bet

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: To protect the homestead from wildfires, Otto dynamites a reservoir in case of an emergency. Charlotte goes fishing with Jane but finds it's not for her. After falling behind on the Fox Cabin, Atz Sr. enlists the help of his family to get back on track.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Backyard Prey
programme.desc: As fall approaches, the Kilchers kick into high gear. A large bull moose stalks the homestead and Eivin must keep his family safe. Atz Sr. hunts bear and nearly loses a horse. Otto begins the massive cleanup from an explosive wildfire prevention project.

programme.title: Cal Fire: A Devil Comin' at You
programme.desc: Lightning strikes in Monterey County ignite two deadly fires. Chief Campbell battles the River Fire while the Carmel Fire forces evacuations ten miles away. When the River Fire suddenly turns towards basecamp, it's an all-out race to stop it.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Ice

programme.desc: Three months after giving birth, Khloé returns and shares her story with her mom. Deeran is paired with a celebrity trainer in hopes of finding the courage to tell his father the truth and be accepted as he is.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Twins and the Bullied Brother
programme.desc: After losing both parents by their teens, twins Ashley and Amber turned to food to cope. Logan was bullied for being overweight by his older brother, which in turn led him down a path that ended in injury and weight gain.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Becoming Amy and From Scrawny to Brawny
programme.desc: Amy had a wake-up call when she and her daughter were kicked off an amusement park ride due to her size. Eddie's first love cheated on him with "buffer" men and he went into a spiral of self-hate and body shame.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: Hungry for Love and The Fighter
programme.desc: Kay has been closed to love since her husband left her after the loss of their unborn child and turned to food as her companion. Javier takes his street fighting skills to the boxing ring to make his family proud after leaving a violent gang.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Widow and the Hollywood Executive
programme.desc: After losing the love of her life in a deadly car crash two years ago, Carolina gained 30 lbs and put her life on hold. Khloé pairs her with celebrity trainer Latreal Mitchell who helps her move past the pain.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Emotional Eater and the Dancer
programme.desc: Hayley has spent her life living in fear of her father, resulting in her seeking comfort in food. By pairing her with celebrity trainer Corey Calliet, Khloé hopes Hayley will find the courage to confront her father.

programme.title: Revenge Body With Khloé Kardashian: The Single Mom and the Disappointing Daughter
programme.desc: At eight months pregnant Terra found out that her boyfriend was cheating on her. Alone and about to become a single mom, Terra drowned her feelings with food.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Rewind
programme.desc: Take a nostalgic look back at the stories that made the Kardashians who they are today, with an exclusive look ahead to season 11.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The New Normal
programme.desc: Even though things are changing for the Kardashian family in ways they never expected, they are determined to remember that family always comes first.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Somewhere Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Kris starts dating someone after 25 years with Bruce, and no one is more critical than her daughters. Khloé ends up in hot water over a controversial Instagram post, and Kim gets a lesson in manners when she tries to recruit Kourtney for her video game.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Carfather
programme.desc: When Scott has a flurry of suspicious activity and vague business dealings, the family decides to pull back the curtain on Scott's man-of-mystery persona. Kris worries she's made a mistake with her living will; Kim stops Bruce from spending all his money.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Retreat
programme.desc: With Rob in crisis, the family intervenes, but when Rob refuses help, Kris is at her wit's end. Khloé leads a Dash teambuilding retreat, and Kim learns that getting pregnant again might not be in the cards.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 1
programme.desc: Eight Triple G judges compete for the title of Last Judge Standing and $40,000 for charity. Guy spins a wheel to determine whose least favorite ingredients will wind up in their steak house dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 2
programme.desc: Judges combine numbers and letters while making a pasta dish with only eight ingredients beginning with the letter 's'. The bottom three chefs enter a wild card round where one must make a comfort food dish in an international cuisine style.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 3
programme.desc: The six remaining judges are put into teams of two to make a regional seafood dish on a budget with a twist. The bottom two teams must each cook for themselves in the redemption round then elevate a guilty pleasure to make it to the semi-finals.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament: Part 4
programme.desc: The remaining judges must create their best cheese dish while playing three of the hardest games. The winner heads to the finale and the remaining judges make a refined meal with ingredient from impromptu alley.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Last Judge Standing Tournament Finale: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The final four make a chicken dinner of the panelist's least favourite foods, then play a food pyramid game to determine ingredient weights and what must be their dish. The final two make a meal of seven unusual ingredients to win $40,000 for charity.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Farm-to-Table and Horse Racing
programme.desc: Boot Camp challenges help the recruits understand how food gets from the farm to their fork. Chefs Anne Burrell and Carla Hall show them how to make meatless meals, and the recruits are judged on their pairings of seasonal fruit and meat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mustache Takeover
programme.desc: Talented chefs Saransh Oberoi and Tom Cuomo bring their skills and enviable mustaches to the kitchen to intimidate Bobby Flay on two levels. David Burtka and Donatella Arpaia are there to cheer them on and perhaps convince Bobby to grow some facial hair.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Going Global
programme.desc: Chef Richard Blais recruits TV personality Laura Vitale to try to knock Bobby Flay down a peg or two. They enlist the help of global food enthusiasts Chef Reza Setayesh and Chef Andy Gaynor to make Bobby's world spin.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Space Kitchen
programme.desc: Following a visit to Space Center Houston with her husband, Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood is inspired to get in the kitchen and make some recipes that are out of this world. Her space-inspired menu starts with Buzzed Aldrin cocktails.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Reunion With a Song
programme.desc: After being on the road performing for more than three years, Trisha Yearwood is ready to spend some time with her family. She throws a family reunion to catch up and share some great food. Her menu includes grilled potato salad and back cheeseburgers.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Afternoon Escape
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood plans a fun day for her friends by taking them to an escape room! But first, they fuel up with coconut vodka cocktails, cornbread panzanella, roasted Cajun nuts and oven beer can chicken.

programme.title: The Kitchen: No Carb Left Behind
programme.desc: The Kitchen is having a celebration fully loaded with everyone's favorite carbs. Sunny Anderson kicks it off with an easy sausage and mushroom rigatoni pie, and Katie Lee takes on a bread basic, sundried tomato and rosemary focaccia.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Lovin' in the Oven
programme.desc: The Kitchen is warming up for the winter with dishes from the oven that are braised, broiled, roasted, toasted and baked. Geoffrey Zakarian makes his beer braised pork pot roast with winter vegetables, and Jeff Mauro shares his roasted gnocchi and veggie.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Winter Weeknight Wins
programme.desc: The Kitchen tackles a week's worth of warming winter dinners, starting with Fusilli with Sausage and Oyster Mushrooms. There's also an Easy Beef French Dip with Quick Jus, Sheet Pan Blackened Salmon with Garlicky Kale and Strawberry Crostata for dessert.

programme.title: Kitchen Crash: Getting Stuffed in Jersey
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro brings three chefs to Paramus, N.J., to convince homeowners to hand over food from their kitchens. With those ingredients, the competitors are challenged to serve festival-style food, something 'stuffed' and street-fair dishes.

programme.title: Chopped: Sunny Side Apps
programme.desc: The chefs contend with gummy fried eggs and corned beef in the appetizer basket.

programme.title: Chopped: $50,000 Champs Challenge: Part 1
programme.desc: Chopped champions return to the stoves, racing the clock and conquering basket after basket with the hope of moving on to the $50,000 finale. Watermelon weirdness in the first basket threatens to shake the champs' confidence.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Mo' Money Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Beast Boy convinces Robin to give the titans a tour of Wayne Manor. The others believe that money must solve all problems, but Robin thinks it's a vice.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Slide
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin help Rocky find love on a dating app.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Outside
programme.desc: The family goes to visit Richard's dad. Based on his basic living standards and extended absence from Richard's life, they assume Frankie must have done a stretch in the slammer. When he visits, they decide to turn their house into a prison.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Loophole
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin give Bobert instructions on how to behave properly, Bobert applies his own logic to the rules.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Copycats
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin meet Kiki and Quack, a pair of siblings that copy everything they do and say. When they realize their whole family is making money online imitating the Wattersons, they realize they need a solution.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Fuss
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are planning on seeing the scariest movie of the year, but everyone else has already seen it, and won't stop talking about it. Gumball is determined to avoid spoilers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Catfish
programme.desc: Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, so Gumball and Darwin, feeling bad, create one called Muriel. Granny Jojo finds out that Louie has been spending time online with 'another woman' and sets out to destroy her, despite her not being real.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The News
programme.desc: All the breaking stories from the Elmore newsroom.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Cycle
programme.desc: Gumball, Darwin and Anais find out that Mr. Wilson has been bullying their dad most of his life. The kids try to help their dad and ultimately seek revenge against Mr. Wilson.

programme.desc: Stan buys the rights a Broadway show after inheriting money from a dead uncle.

programme.title: American Dad!: Mom Sauce
programme.desc: Steve's life is turned upside down when Snot gets rich after his mom starts selling a new dipping sauce. Klaus, Stan, Roger and Jeff become mall fashion show models.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Family, Bublé, Deep-Fried Turkey

programme.desc: When a tornado rips through Laurel, the home Ben and Erin renovated for Nancy and Richard T Jones is severely damaged. They vow to not only restore it to its pre-tornado condition, but to re-imagine it.

programme.desc: A photographer and close friend of the Napiers is looking for a traditional home with a touch of modern style. After deciding on a classic mansion in need of a complete makeover, Ben and Erin transform the tired house into a show-stopping home.

programme.desc: When romance blogger Nora seeks inspiration for her book by having a passionate fling with her sexy next door neighbour, her 'no strings attached' relationship quickly spirals into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Movie: Left for Dead
programme.desc: A woman must piece together the details of the accident as they slowly return to her. When she finally remembers that she has a daughter who's missing, she must lead the police to the girl's kidnappers.

programme.title: Movie: Was I Really Kidnapped?
programme.desc: A woman is released from her abductors hands, and goes to police to file a report. While speaking to detectives, her story begins to unravel and she is forced to clear her own name, and identify her attackers.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Secret of the Red Shed
programme.desc: The AIMS team sets off to track down one of the cloaked figures at the heart of the mystery of Spearfinger. Willy and Wild Bill sneak down for a recon mission, and the team realizes the key to their quest is in the rock overhang and the red shed.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Twisted Torch
programme.desc: The AIMS team searches for Jeff after he is drawn away by a mysterious cloaked figure. Their frantic hunt leads them to a pair of finely crafted torches that shed light on the Cherokee folklore surrounding Spearfinger.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: A Tribute to Trapper
programme.desc: The remaining members of the AIMS team gather around a campfire to celebrate the life of team leader and friend John 'Trapper' Tice. Tears are shed and laughter echoes throughout the Appalachian night sky as they relive their favorite Trapper moments.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: New Evidence
programme.desc: The team re-examines their findings from last year's expedition in Oregon and reveals stunning new evidence. Plus, the new Bigfoot target zone is revealed along with never-before-seen footage of the remarkable next chapter of their journey.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Continues
programme.desc: After coming closer than ever to proving the existence of Bigfoot in Oregon, the team continues their search in the mountains of Kentucky. They'll spend the next two and a half weeks in search of Sasquatch, unless it finds them first.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Call and Response
programme.desc: After receiving a recording of an alleged Bigfoot call, Bryce blasts the howl over a speaker to elicit a response. With Russell positioned high on a hill and Ronny and Mireya down in the valley below, the team may get the encounter they're looking for.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Wolves of West Virginia
programme.desc: The surviving members of AIMS head out on a brand-new adventure that team leader Trapper set up for them before he passed. Equipped with Trapper's journal, they travel to the mountains of the Tygart Valley to prove there are still wolves in West Virginia.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: The Mystery of the Death Cat Barn
programme.desc: The AIMS team investigates the mysterious barn where they heard the roar of the Cherokee Death Cat. Their quest to catch the ferocious feline leads to a shocking discovery no one is prepared for.

programme.desc: After coming closer than ever to proving the existence of Bigfoot in Oregon, the team continues their search in the mountains of Kentucky. They'll spend the next two and a half weeks in search of Sasquatch, unless it finds them first.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Dark Angel and Snowed In

programme.title: My Haunted House: Camp/ Leviathan

programme.title: My Haunted House: Truth or Dare/ The Morgue

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Church/ Skin Book

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Boy Did It and Frozen Forest

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Chateau She Did That
programme.desc: After several years of blood, sweat and tears, Shereé unveils Chateau Shereé at a housewarming party that is one for the Atlanta history books. At the party, things heat up when Kenya finds herself going toe-to-toe with a mega-blast from the past.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Ten Ten, Twenty Twenty
programme.desc: Porsha returns home from her second arrest in Kentucky and also reveals that she and Dennis have called it quits. Kenya offers Cynthia marital advice and juggles her fast track friendship with LaToya.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: From One Surprise to Another

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Don't Come for Me Unless I've Invited You
programme.desc: After nearly spoiling Cynthia's proposal last year, Kenya seeks redemption with a surprise engagement dinner. Kenya uses the opportunity to confront Porsha about being uninvited to her party.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Don't Come for Me Unless I've Invited You
programme.desc: After nearly spoiling Cynthia's proposal last year, Kenya seeks redemption with a surprise engagement dinner. Kenya uses the opportunity to confront Porsha about being uninvited to her party.

programme.desc: With the stay-at-home order finally lifted, the divas of Dallas are ready to make the most of their quarantine bubble, as safely as possible. Kameron gets a new dog and hosts a socially distanced garage sale.

programme.desc: Meredith and Seth are happy to be back together, while Heather has an awkward Valentine’s Day with her ex-husband and Lisa spends time with her family at the aquarium.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Montcalm and Carry On
programme.desc: Josh Altman is caught between his fiancée and his client in a deal that could result in triple commission. Josh Flagg refuses to give up as he struggles to attract a buyer for his historic hilltop listings. The Brits' partnership begins to unravel.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: White Wedding Day
programme.desc: Josh and Heather prepare to say their vows in Aspen, but first face off in a tough negotiation that could keep them from walking down the aisle. Josh Flagg lists a coveted lot in the Beverly Hills flats, but his strategy backfires.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Zeppo Marx the Spot
programme.desc: Josh Flagg lists a mid-century modern home built by Zeppo Marx, and must fight off developers looking to bulldoze the iconic structure. Newlyweds Josh and Heather return home from their wedding and are up against a ticking clock to find their dream house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Nightmare on Altman Street

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Turn and Burn

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Surf vs. Turf
programme.desc: Madison goes up against David and James for a modern Malibu compound, but when the owner toys with the idea of teaming them all up, Madison doesn’t pull any punches to try and win the listing for himself.

programme.title: Movie: The Martian

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic World
programme.desc: A new hybrid dinosaur is developed to encourage a surge in attendance in Jurassic World, a fully functioning dinosaur theme park. When the dinosaur escapes and runs amok, it's up to the park staff to contain her before she does even more damage.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: A rescue operation is mounted to a ruined dinosaur theme park to save the previously extinct animals from a pending volcanic eruption, but it turns out that not everyone involved wants to save them for altruistic reasons, putting the world at risk.
